message:
chore: update dependencies to latest compatible versions (wa-1ms1)

cargo update bumped 29 packages including:
- cc 1.2.55 -> 1.2.56
- libc 0.2.181 -> 0.2.182
- asupersync, fastapi-rust, fastmcp-rust, ftui (git deps)

All workspace tests pass. Pre-existing failures in frankenterm-core
(learn, runtime, scrollback_eviction) are unrelated to this update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
